The repo already\nhas the gates, health endpoints, and launch docs — this fills the named gaps and keeps a\nsingle source of truth.\n\n| File | Purpose |\n|---|---|\n| `scripts/dealix_close_now.sh` | Read-only verification runner: `make doctor / env-check / security-smoke / api-contract-check / test / prod-verify` + local/prod `/health` + `/health/deep` smoke. SECRET_PATTERNS.items():\n+            for m in re.finditer(pat, text):\n+                snippet = m.group(0)\n+                # Skip obvious placeholders / allowlisted files.\n+                if allow or PLACEHOLDER_RE.search(snippet):\n+                    continue\n+                line_no = text[: m.start()].count(\"\\n\") + 1\n+                findings.append(\n+                    {\n+                        \"file\": paths.rel(path),\n+                        \"line\": line_no,\n+                        \"type\": label,\n+                        \"match_preview\": snippet[:12] + \"…\",\n+                    }\n+                )\n+    clean = len(findings) == 0\n+    return {\n+        \"clean\": clean,\n+        \"files_scanned\": files_scanned,\n+        \"findings_count\": len(findings),\n+        \"findings\": findings,\n+        \"scanned_globs\": list(SCAN_GLOBS),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def main() -> int:\n+    paths.ensure_dirs()\n+    result = scan()\n+    out = paths.FINAL_CONTROL_OUT / \"secret_risk_scan.json\"\n+    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    print(f\"[secrets] files scanned: {result['files_scanned']}\")\n+    print(f\"[secrets] findings: {result['findings_count']}\")\n+    for f in result[\"findings\"]:\n+        print(f\"[secrets]   FAIL  {f['file']}:{f['line']} {f['type']}\")",

The secret is not configured on `Dealix-sa`, so the action aborts before scanning. |\n| `filesystem-scan` | `aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` no longer exists. Tags 0.0.1–0.34.2 were deleted during the March 2026 supply-chain remediation (all those tags had been hijacked to steal CI secrets). The setup step therefore fails immediately. |\n\nNeither failure was caused by feature code — they were pre-existing infra issues.\n\n## Fix\n\n### Gitleaks (`secret-scan`)\n\nReplace `gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2` with a direct install of the MIT-licensed Gitleaks CLI binary (v8.30.1). The CLI requires no license key regardless of org visibility. SARIF output is saved and uploaded to the GitHub Security tab via `github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3` on `if: always()`, so detected secrets still appear in the Security tab even if the scan step itself fails.\n\n### Trivy (`filesystem-scan`)\n\nBump `aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` → `@0.36.0`. v0.36.0 (April 2026) is the latest release and is protected by GitHub's immutable releases feature, making it safe from the tag-hijacking attack that affected all prior tags. All other scan parameters (severity, exit-code, format) are unchanged.\n\n## Test plan\n\n- [ ] `secret-scan` job runs to completion with no `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` secret present\n- [ ] `filesystem-scan` job runs to completion — action setup succeeds at `@0.36.0`\n- [ ] Both jobs green on a clean repo (no secrets, no critical/high CVEs in deps)\n- [ ] SARIF report appears in the repo's Security → Code scanning tab after a successful run\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01WsPg3YP4Ectc3CqpqqJeAF\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01WsPg3YP4Ectc3CqpqqJeAF)_",

.\reports\github-context\pr-614\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,161 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Shared helpers for Dealix V9 Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS verifiers.\n+\n+All V9 verify scripts are static, read-only checks. They:\n+  * confirm required operating files exist and have substantive content,\n+  * scan for forbidden / unverified claims (the non-negotiables),\n+  * write a machine-readable JSON report under outputs/v9_verification/,\n+  * print a single-line VERDICT and return an exit code.\n+\n+No secrets, no network, no external sending. Founder-approval-first by design.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import re\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Iterable\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+OUTPUT_DIR = REPO / \"outputs\" / \"v9_verification\"\n+\n+# Minimum byte size for a doc to count as \"substantive\" content.\n+MIN_DOC_BYTES = 400\n+\n+# Forbidden / unverified-claim patterns. Kept deliberately specific so the\n+# non-negotiables can be referenced (e.g. \"we do NOT guarantee ROI\") without\n+# tripping the scanner — only affirmative bad claims match.\n+FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (\n+    (r\"guaranteed\\s+roi\", \"guaranteed ROI claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bwe\\s+guarantee\\s+(?:a\\s+)?(?:\\d+\\s*%|return|revenue|results?)\\b\", \"guaranteed results claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+    required_files: Iterable[str],\n+    required_configs: Iterable[tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]] = (),\n+    output_name: str | None = None,\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Run the standard V9 check for a system and persist a JSON report.\n+\n+    Returns the report dict with a top-level ``verdict`` of PASS/FAIL.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    file_results = [check_file(p) for p in required_files]\n+    config_results = [check_json(p, keys) for p, keys in required_configs]\n+\n+    missing = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if not r[\"exists\"]]\n+    thin = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"] and not r[\"substantive\"]]\n+    bad_json = [r[\"path\"] for r in config_results if not r.get(\"valid_json\")]\n+    missing_keys = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"missing\": r[\"missing_keys\"]}\n+        for r in config_results\n+        if r.get(\"missing_keys\")\n+    ]\n+    violations = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"violations\": r[\"violations\"]}\n+        for r in (file_results + config_results)\n+        if r.get(\"violations\")\n+    ]\n+\n+    passed = not (missing or thin or bad_json or missing_keys or violations)\n+    report = {\n+        \"system\": system,\n+        \"date\": date.today().isoformat(),\n+        \"verdict\": \"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\",",

They:\n+  * confirm required operating files exist and have substantive content,\n+  * scan for forbidden / unverified claims (the non-negotiables),\n+  * write a machine-readable JSON report under outputs/v9_verification/,\n+  * print a single-line VERDICT and return an exit code.\n+\n+No secrets, no network, no external sending. Founder-approval-first by design.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import re\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Iterable\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+OUTPUT_DIR = REPO / \"outputs\" / \"v9_verification\"\n+\n+# Minimum byte size for a doc to count as \"substantive\" content.\n+MIN_DOC_BYTES = 400\n+\n+# Forbidden / unverified-claim patterns. Kept deliberately specific so the\n+# non-negotiables can be referenced (e.g. \"we do NOT guarantee ROI\") without\n+# tripping the scanner — only affirmative bad claims match.\n+FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (\n+    (r\"guaranteed\\s+roi\", \"guaranteed ROI claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bwe\\s+guarantee\\s+(?:a\\s+)?(?:\\d+\\s*%|return|revenue|results?)\\b\", \"guaranteed results claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+    required_files: Iterable[str],\n+    required_configs: Iterable[tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]] = (),\n+    output_name: str | None = None,\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Run the standard V9 check for a system and persist a JSON report.\n+\n+    Returns the report dict with a top-level ``verdict`` of PASS/FAIL.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    file_results = [check_file(p) for p in required_files]\n+    config_results = [check_json(p, keys) for p, keys in required_configs]\n+\n+    missing = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if not r[\"exists\"]]\n+    thin = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"] and not r[\"substantive\"]]\n+    bad_json = [r[\"path\"] for r in config_results if not r.get(\"valid_json\")]\n+    missing_keys = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"missing\": r[\"missing_keys\"]}\n+        for r in config_results\n+        if r.get(\"missing_keys\")\n+    ]\n+    violations = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"violations\": r[\"violations\"]}\n+        for r in (file_results + config_results)\n+        if r.get(\"violations\")\n+    ]\n+\n+    passed = not (missing or thin or bad_json or missing_keys or violations)\n+    report = {\n+        \"system\": system,\n+        \"date\": date.today().isoformat(),\n+        \"verdict\": \"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\",\n+        \"summary\": {\n+            \"files_required\": len(file_results),\n+            \"files_present\": sum(1 for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"]),\n+            \"configs_required\": len(config_results),\n+            \"missing\": missing,\n+            \"thin\": thin,\n+            \"bad_json\": bad_json,\n+            \"missing_keys\": missing_keys,\n+            \"violations\": violations,\n+        },\n+        \"files\": file_results,\n+        \"configs\": config_results,\n+    }\n+\n+    OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    name = output_name or system.lower().replace(\" \", \"_\")\n+    (OUTPUT_DIR / f\"{name}.json\").write_text(\n+        json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n+    )\n+    return report\n+\n+\n+def print_and_exit(report: dict) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Print a human verdict line and return an exit code (0 PASS / 1 FAIL).\"\"\"\n+    s = report[\"summary\"]\n+    print(f\"[{report['system']}] verdict={report['verdict']} \"\n+          f\"files={s['files_present']}/{s['files_required']}\")\n+    if s[\"missing\"]:\n+        print(f\"  missing: {s['missing']}\")",

claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+    required_files: Iterable[str],\n+    required_configs: Iterable[tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]] = (),\n+    output_name: str | None = None,\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Run the standard V9 check for a system and persist a JSON report.\n+\n+    Returns the report dict with a top-level ``verdict`` of PASS/FAIL.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    file_results = [check_file(p) for p in required_files]\n+    config_results = [check_json(p, keys) for p, keys in required_configs]\n+\n+    missing = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if not r[\"exists\"]]\n+    thin = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"] and not r[\"substantive\"]]\n+    bad_json = [r[\"path\"] for r in config_results if not r.get(\"valid_json\")]\n+    missing_keys = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"missing\": r[\"missing_keys\"]}\n+        for r in config_results\n+        if r.get(\"missing_keys\")\n+    ]\n+    violations = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"violations\": r[\"violations\"]}\n+        for r in (file_results + config_results)\n+        if r.get(\"violations\")\n+    ]\n+\n+    passed = not (missing or thin or bad_json or missing_keys or violations)\n+    report = {\n+        \"system\": system,\n+        \"date\": date.today().isoformat(),\n+        \"verdict\": \"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\",\n+        \"summary\": {\n+            \"files_required\": len(file_results),\n+            \"files_present\": sum(1 for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"]),\n+            \"configs_required\": len(config_results),\n+            \"missing\": missing,\n+            \"thin\": thin,\n+            \"bad_json\": bad_json,\n+            \"missing_keys\": missing_keys,\n+            \"violations\": violations,\n+        },\n+        \"files\": file_results,\n+ f\"{name}.json\").write_text(\n+        json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n+    )\n+    return report\n+\n+\n+def print_and_exit(report: dict) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Print a human verdict line and return an exit code (0 PASS / 1 FAIL).\"\"\"\n+    s = report[\"summary\"]\n+    print(f\"[{report['system']}] verdict={report['verdict']} \"\n+          f\"files={s['files_present']}/{s['files_required']}\")\n+    if s[\"missing\"]:\n+        print(f\"  missing: {s['missing']}\")\n+    if s[\"thin\"]:\n+        print(f\"  thin: {s['thin']}\")\n+    if The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Deterministic given the same date + seed so CI and\n+tests are stable. max_chars:\n+        quality -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"over_length\")\n+    if len(body) < 40:\n+        quality -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"too_short\")\n+\n+    # tied to vertical\n+ .\reports\github-context\pr-603\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Summary\n\nA complete, **review-only** Commercial Launch Operating System for the Saudi/GCC B2B market, now spanning **outreach + social/media + website**. It generates daily opportunities, classifies them, writes high-quality bilingual drafts, runs them through quality + compliance + safety gates, and places them in a **Founder Review Queue**.\n\n> ⚠️ **The system never sends or posts anything externally.** No SMTP, no API send, no social auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets. The founder reviews and publishes every message manually.\n\n## First 5 verticals\n1. Facilities Management & Maintenance — إدارة المرافق والصيانة\n2. .\reports\github-context\pr-613\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Generate review-only commercial outreach drafts (default target 400).\n+\n+Outputs (under ``outputs/commercial_launch/YYYY-MM-DD/``):\n+    - draft_queue.jsonl     one JSON object per draft\n+    - top_50_priority.md    the 50 highest-priority drafts as a review table\n+    - draft_summary.json    aggregate counts for dashboards/verifiers\n+\n+SAFETY: every draft is REVIEW-ONLY. Nothing here sends email, WhatsApp,\n+LinkedIn, or submits a form. No scraping, no secrets. Companies/contacts are\n+synthetic placeholders unless a local seed file is provided by the founder.\n+\n+    AI prepares. Founder approves. Manual action only. No external sending.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import hashlib\n+\n+from _v7_revenue_common import (\n+    OUTPUTS,\n+    SAFETY_BANNER,\n+    SEED_CHANNELS,\n+    SEED_VERTICALS,\n+    slugify,\n+    today,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+\n+LANGUAGES = (\"ar\", \"en\")\n+RISK_LEVELS = (\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\")\n+\n+\n+def _score(seed: str) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Deterministic 40-99 priority score from a stable hash (no randomness).\"\"\"\n+    h = int(hashlib.sha256(seed.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest(), 16)\n+    return 40 + (h % 60)\n+\n+\n+def _draft(idx: int) -> dict:\n+    vertical = SEED_VERTICALS[idx % len(SEED_VERTICALS)]\n+    channel = SEED_CHANNELS[idx % len(SEED_CHANNELS)]\n+    language = LANGUAGES[idx % len(LANGUAGES)]\n+    company = f\"Prospect {idx:04d} ({vertical})\"\n+    draft_id = f\"DRAFT-{today()}-{idx:04d}\"\n+    score = _score(draft_id)\n+    risk = RISK_LEVELS[score % len(RISK_LEVELS)]\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"مرحباً، لاحظنا أن شركات {vertical} تواجه احتكاكاً في عملياتها اليومية. \"\n+            \"أعددنا تشخيصاً مختصراً قد يكشف فرص توفير. هل تسمح بمكالمة 15 دقيقة؟ \"\n+            \"(مسودة للمراجعة فقط — لن تُرسل تلقائياً)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"Hi, we noticed {vertical} teams hit recurring operational friction. \"\n+            \"We prepared a short diagnostic that may surface savings. Open to a \"\n+            \"15-minute call? (Review-only draft — not auto-sent.)\"\n+        )\n+    return {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"company\": company,\n+        \"vertical\": vertical,\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": language,\n+        \"priority_score\": score,\n+        \"risk_level\": risk,\n+        \"stage\": \"draft_generated\",\n+        \"manual_copy_text\": copy,\n+        \"review_only\": True,\n+        \"send_blocked\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, date: str | None = None) -> dict:\n+    date = today(date)\n+    out_dir = OUTPUTS / \"commercial_launch\" / date\n+    drafts = [_draft(i) for i in range(1, target + 1)]\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+\n+    top = sorted(drafts, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)[:50]\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Top 50 Priority Drafts — Review Only\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {SAFETY_BANNER}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"Generated: {date} · Total drafts: {len(drafts)}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"| # | draft_id | company | vertical | channel | lang | score | risk |\",\n+        \"| - | -------- | ------- | -------- | ------- | ---- | ----- | ---- |\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, d in enumerate(top, start=1):\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"| {i} | {d['draft_id']} | {d['company']} | {d['vertical']} | \"\n+            f\"{d['channel']} | {d['language']} | {d['priority_score']} | {d['risk_level']} |\"\n+        )\n+    lines += [\n+        \"\",\n+        \"## Founder note\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"These are preparation drafts. Pick the strongest, copy the text \"\n+        \"**manually**, and send it yourself through your own account. \"\n+        \"Nothing here is auto-sent.\",",

License key is required.`). .\reports\github-context\pr-630\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Unblock the Repository Hardening workflow\n\nTwo checks in `repository-hardening.yml` fail on **every** PR in this org (e.g. #622) without providing any security value. This PR fixes both. No application code is touched.\n\n### 1. Trivy filesystem scan\n`aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` was removed upstream — the run fails immediately with `Unable to resolve action aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0, unable to find version 0.24.0`. Bumped to `@master`, consistent with how `docker-build.yml` already references this action. (Recommend re-pinning to a verified immutable tag in a follow-up once one is confirmed.)\n\n### 2. Gitleaks secret scan\n`gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2` requires a license key for GitHub organizations: `[Dealix-sa] is an organization. License key is required… missing gitleaks license`. Without the secret it errors **before scanning**, so it blocks PRs while scanning nothing. This PR:\n- wires `GITLEAKS_LICENSE: ${{ secrets.GITLEAKS_LICENSE }}` so the step works the instant the org secret is added, and\n- marks the step `continue-on-error: true` so it stops blocking until then.\n\n**Action for the maintainer:** add a `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` org/repo secret (grab one at gitleaks.io), then remove the `continue-on-error: true` line to make Gitleaks enforcing again.\n\n### Scope\n- Touches only `.github/workflows/repository-hardening.yml`.\n- YAML validated locally.\n- Kept separate from the feature work in #622 by request.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b)_",

advanced)\n   - Proof pack template generation\n   - Creates /pilots/{pilot_id}/ directories per pilot\n\n4. **scripts/dealix_founder_daily_complete.sh** (100 lines)\n   - Master daily orchestrator: .\reports\github-context\pr-713\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Summary\n\nIntegrates the V1-V5 commercial operating system backup (`dealix-v1v5backup.zip`) into the repo, **additively** — no existing files were overwritten. Sourced from the user's backup ZIP, merged on a dedicated review branch per the explicit instruction to **not merge to `main` directly**.\n\n**Scope:** 752 files changed, ~116K insertions. Adds web pages, API routers/middleware/security, business OS layers, founder operator scripts, doctrine tests, CI workflows, reports tree, and supporting libraries.\n\n## What's added\n\n- **Web pages** (`apps/web/app/*`): brand, cases, command-center, daily-draft, data-room, delivery-os, kpi-finance, lead-engine, offers, partner-room, persuasion-room, pipeline, pricing, revenue-machine, sales-assets, war-room, automated-sales, client-acquisition, plus `/api` routes (analytics, company-os, sales-machine).\n- **API surface**: middleware (`ip_allowlist`, `metrics`, `privileged_audit`), security (`mfa`, `mfa_policy`, `oidc`, `saml`, `scim`), routers (`commercial_ops_router`, `payments_router`).\n- **Business OS** (`business/*`): acquisition, ai, analytics, brand, ceo, client-portal, closing, conversion, crm, data-room, delivery, finance, governance, industries, launch, lead-lists, legal-lite, offers, persuasion, pricing, proof, proposals, reports, retention, review, sales-automation, sales-machine, scoring + `_data`, `_generated`.\n- **Founder operator scripts**: `dealix_daily_operator`, `dealix_v4_run_all`, `dealix_v5_run_all`, all the `generate_*` scripts (board pack, CEO brief, dashboard data, proposal, quote, ops health, retention risk, weekly review, etc.), verifiers (`verify_company_os`, `verify_dealix_ultimate_os`, `verify_sales_machine`, …), and approval gates (`approve_outreach_draft`, `reject_outreach_draft`, `mark_*`).\n- **Doctrine tests**: `test_no_auto_send`, `test_no_guaranteed_revenue_claims`, `test_commercial_claim_safety`, `test_pricing_requires_approval`, `test_payment_handoff_requires_approval`, `test_proposal_requires_qualified_opportunity`, `test_walk_away_rules`, `test_whatsapp_safety_gates`, `test_outbound_safety_gates`, `test_partner_model_margin_rules`, `test_customer_success_handoff_required`, `test_agent_permission_safety`, `test_commercial_offer_mapping`, `test_payment_pricing_safety`.\n- **CI workflows**: `agentic-security-gate.yml`, `client-acquisition-delivery-check.yml`, `dealix-ultimate-os-check.yml`.\n- **Reports tree** across 30+ domains.\n- Other: `learning_flywheel/`, `self_evolving_os/`, `intelligence_os` additions, `templates/contracts`, `autonomous_growth` (api, case_study_pipeline, content_calendar, seo_cluster_engine, .\reports\github-context\pr-671\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@\n+\"\"\"Append-only decision ledger for the Dealix Now engine.\n+\n+Every founder decision on a draft (approve / reject / any note) is recorded as\n+one JSONL line. ``approve`` / ``reject`` ONLY log and return a result dict —\n+they never send anything. ``approve`` returns founder-operated ``mailto`` and\n+``whatsapp`` deep links (URL-encoded from the draft subject/body) so the\n+founder can send manually. Dealix never auto-sends (doctrine rule 5 + agent\n+interaction rule 1).\n+\n+JSONL store with env override, mirroring ``value_os/value_ledger.py`` and\n+``payment_ops/renewal_scheduler.py``: path from ``DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH``,\n+default ``var/now_ledger.jsonl`` (``var/`` is gitignored).\n+\n+Pure I/O + string building: no network, no API keys, no LLM.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import logging\n+import os\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from urllib.parse import quote\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+_DEFAULT_PATH = \"var/now_ledger.jsonl\"\n+\n+APPROVED_STATUS = \"approved — ready to send by founder (Dealix never auto-sends)\"\n+REJECTED_STATUS = \"rejected — archived, nothing sent\"\n+\n+VALID_DECISIONS = frozenset({\"approved\", \"rejected\", \"noted\"})\n+\n+\n+def _ledger_path() -> Path:\n+    raw = os.getenv(\"DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH\", _DEFAULT_PATH)\n+    path = Path(raw)\n+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return path\n+\n+\n+def _now_iso() -> str:\n+    return datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+\n+\n+def _find_latest(draft_id: str) -> dict | None:\n+    \"\"\"Return the most recent ledger record for ``draft_id``, or ``None``.\"\"\"\n+    latest: dict | None = None\n+    for rec in list_decisions():\n+        if rec.get(\"draft_id\") == draft_id:\n+            latest = rec\n+    return latest\n+\n+\n+def record_decision(\n+    draft_id: str,\n+    decision: str,\n+    actor: str = \"founder\",\n+    note: str = \"\",\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Append one decision record and return it.\n+\n+    ``decision`` is normalized; unknown values are stored as ``noted`` so the\n+    log never silently drops an action.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    normalized = decision.strip().lower()\n+    if normalized not in VALID_DECISIONS:\n+        normalized = \"noted\"\n+    record = {\n+        \"draft_id\": str(draft_id),\n+        \"decision\": normalized,\n+        \"actor\": str(actor or \"founder\"),\n+        \"note\": str(note or \"\"),\n+        \"logged_at\": _now_iso(),\n+    }\n+    path = _ledger_path()\n+    with path.open(\"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n+        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False))\n+        handle.write(\"\\n\")\n+    log.info(\"now_decision_recorded draft_id=%s decision=%s actor=%s\", draft_id, normalized, actor)",

It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,",

It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,\n+            len(line_items),\n+        )\n+        return proposal\n+\n+    # ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+    def _guard_no_guarantee(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> None:\n+        blob = \" \".join([req.notes, *req.pain_points]).lower()\n+        if any(tok in blob for tok in _FORBIDDEN_EN) or any(\n+            tok in (req.notes + \" \".join(req.pain_points)) for tok in _FORBIDDEN_AR\n+        ):\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"Guaranteed-outcome language is forbidden (no_guaranteed_sales_claims) — \"\n+                \"ممنوع وعود مبيعات مضمونة.\"\n+            )\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _proposal_id(req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> str:\n+        seed = f\"{req.company_name}{req.sector}{datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()}\"\n+        return \"txp_\" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal — {req.company_name}**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"المعرف: `{p.proposal_id}` | التاريخ: {now} | الحالة: **يتطلب موافقة المؤسس**\",\n+            f\"ID: `{p.proposal_id}` | Date: {now} | .\reports\github-context\pr-701\review_comments.json:145:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,272 @@\n+\"\"\"Transformation OS Proposal Generator — bilingual (AR+EN), governed, stateless.\n+\n+Builds an enterprise transformation proposal from the canonical service catalog\n+(`auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog`). It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,\n+            len(line_items),\n+        )\n+        return proposal\n+\n+    # ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+    def _guard_no_guarantee(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> None:\n+        blob = \" \".join([req.notes, *req.pain_points]).lower()\n+        if any(tok in blob for tok in _FORBIDDEN_EN) or any(\n+            tok in (req.notes + \" \".join(req.pain_points)) for tok in _FORBIDDEN_AR\n+        ):\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"Guaranteed-outcome language is forbidden (no_guaranteed_sales_claims) — \"\n+                \"ممنوع وعود مبيعات مضمونة.\"\n+            )\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _proposal_id(req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> str:\n+        seed = f\"{req.company_name}{req.sector}{datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()}\"\n+        return \"txp_\" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal — {req.company_name}**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"المعرف: `{p.proposal_id}` | التاريخ: {now} | الحالة: **يتطلب موافقة المؤسس**\",\n+            f\"ID: `{p.proposal_id}` | Date: {now} | Status: **approval_required**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"القطاع / Sector: {req.sector}\",\n+        ]\n+        if req.stakeholders:\n+            lines.append(f\"أصحاب القرار / Stakeholders: {', '.join(req.stakeholders)}\")\n+        lines += [\n+            \"\",\n+            \"## ملخص تنفيذي / Executive Summary\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"نصمّم نظام تشغيل أعمال This PR delivers the same vision through the existing governed surfaces instead.\n\n## التغييرات / Changes\n\n**Catalog (single source of truth):**\n- `ServiceOffering` gains optional setup/monthly range fields + a `\"transformation\"` journey stage (the 7 core offerings are unchanged).\n- 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings added → registry **7 → 17**: AI Command Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance, Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System.
